title: Citation
description: A citation from a rrxiv paper to another work. May reference another rrxiv paper (target_paper_id), an external work via DOI/arXiv/URL, or a raw BibTeX entry.

id.description: Stable, globally unique citation ID within a paper.

key.description: BibTeX key as it appears in the paper source.

target_paper_id.description: If the cited work is itself in rrxiv, its `id` (server-assigned UUIDv7). Null otherwise.

target_doi.description: DOI of the cited work, if any. DOIs are case-insensitive in matching; the registrant's chosen case is preserved.

target_arxiv_id.description: arXiv identifier of the cited work, if any (e.g. '2305.12345').

target_url.description: Generic URL fallback for the cited work.

bibtex_entry.description: Full BibTeX entry for the cited work. Always present so the citation is verifiable even if external links rot.

referenced_in.description: IDs of sections or claims that cite this work.

is_self_citation.description: True if the cited work shares an author with the citing paper.
